markdown:
#  How do I know if my DocuSign account is synced with Procore? 
##  Answer 
To determine if your Procore user account is synced with DocuSign:
  1. Click your initials in the upper right-hand corner of the Procore web application's navigation bar.
  2. Choose **My Profile Settings** from the drop-down menu.  
This opens the **My Profile Settings** page.
  3. Click the **Personal** tab.
  4. Scroll to the bottom of the page. Then:
     * If you see a **Login with DocuSign** button, your account is NOT yet synced. To sync it, see [Link Your DocuSign Account to a Procore Project](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/docusign/tutorials/link-your-docusign-account-to-a-procore-project).  
OR
     * If you see 'Synced' next to the **Link DocuSign Account** label, your account is synced.


#####  Tip
If you see 'Synced' next to the Link DocuSign Account label on the Personal tab of the My Profile Settings page, your DocuSign account is synced with Procore.
![Link Docusign Account](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/b56bf7d0334ce660a7ed76a7958e7a05/4e8a62cb9b5d54a6c033290221a22c11/link-docusign-account.png?fm=webp)
